title: Thirteen: Risk & Rogue
description:
A card battle game that blends the strategy of the Chinese poker game Thirteen Cards with a roguelike item system, supporting both single-player stages and online two-player versus on Steam.

How To Play:
survive 24 rounds with your chips.
Each round has 2 battles. Compare your three rows after attacking.
13 cards into Front 3, Middle 5, and Back 5.
Back must be at least Middle, and Middle at least Front, or you foul.
After a battle, there is a chance to gain an item.
Hand ranks low to high: High Card < Pair < Two Pair < Three < Straight < Flush < Full House < Four Kind < Straight Flush.
Front has only 3 cards, so it compares High Card, Pair, and Three.
description_short: Thirteen: Risk & Rogue is a card battle game that blends roguelike survival with the strategy of the Chinese poker game Thirteen Cards. With a limited stack of chips, you must fight your way through multiple stages — each one a true battle of wits. Survive, and victory is yours.
